title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Equitas Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Equitas Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
